purpose: Remove condensate from compressed air system to maintain air quality and prevent downstream equipment damage

inputs.name: cooled_compressed_air
inputs.description: Temperature of compressed air entering the condensate trap

states.name: discharge_flexible_condition
states.description: Discharge flexible degradation due to clogging

states.name: float_valve_condition
states.description: Float valve degradation due to contamination buildup

events.name: condensate_not_discharged_during_loading
events.description: Condensate is not discharged from condensate trap during loading

events.name: discharge_flexible_clogged
events.description: Discharge flexible is blocked preventing condensate drainage

events.name: float_valve_malfunction
events.description: Float valve assembly not operating correctly

parameters.name: discharge_flexible_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for discharge flexible degradation

parameters.name: discharge_flexible_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Base degradation rate for discharge flexible

parameters.name: float_valve_degradation_time
parameters.description: Time constant for float valve degradation

parameters.name: float_valve_degradation_rate
parameters.description: Base degradation rate for float valve

parameters.name: discharge_warning_threshold
parameters.description: Combined degradation threshold for condensate discharge warning

parameters.name: discharge_flexible_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Degradation threshold for discharge flexible failure

parameters.name: float_valve_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Degradation threshold for float valve failure

state_transition_logic: discharge_flexible_condition decreases by (discharge_flexible_degradation_rate / discharge_flexible_degradation_time) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
float_valve_condition decreases by (float_valve_degradation_rate / float_valve_degradation_time) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
assumptions: Degradation rates are constant over time
Discharge flexible and float valve degrade independently
Condensate discharge effectiveness is proportional to the product of both component conditions
Temperature variations do not significantly affect degradation rates
No maintenance or cleaning actions are modeled
